validation.summary: Syntax checks cover current source files, control-plane modules, smoke script, demo scripts, test files, and test helpers.
Focused local CLI lifecycle test passed 2/2 after duplicate-start assertion repair.

controllerChecks: package.json preserves `npm run check` and `npm test`.
`npm run check` now includes new control-plane source, smoke script, official demo script, hands-on demo scripts, helpers, and test files.
Leader repair updated a legacy local duplicate-start assertion to match the accepted product contract: duplicate owned starts return the existing run without spawning another process.
No cross-platform-ready claim was made from Windows-local validation.
acceptedResidualRisks: Future JavaScript files must be added to the explicit check script unless the project adopts an accepted dynamic checker.
Release smoke and final branch review remain T037/T038.
followUpWork: T037 run quickstart release smoke and record final ledger evidence.
